title: Suricatoos — Sensor→Score Findings Push
description: The payload the ingest POSTs to the Score (reNgine) inbound import endpoint after importing a sensor report into the central gvmd (ADR-0007 G). The tenant is the AUTHORITATIVE cert Organization (never what the sensor claimed), and findings are the in-scope, re-attested set. The Score partitions/stores these by tenant. Bound by ingest/sensorreport (Go) and the reNgine Score receiver.

tenant.description: authoritative cert O; the Score partition key
